title: Unique Party 40501 - Pirate Party Masks, Pack of 8
features: Pack of 8 Party Masks from the Pirate Party range
Pirate masks are made from colourful card and have an attached elastic cord to ensure a secure fit
Great fun for a boys birthday party or pirate themed party
Give to guests for them to wear, display on your party table as party decorations, or use as party bag fillers at a pirate theme party
Search for other Pirate Party supplies and coordinating solid colour party decorations from Unique Party
description: From the manufacturer Pirate Birthday Add-On Items These add-on items are the perfect addition to your Raindow Dots Birthday Party. Go bold with a contrasting soild colour theme to complement this range and make your party POP! Are you having helium balloons? Dont forget the curling ribbon and weights!
